productOptionsHtml:
Use this section for ordering rules: style number, price band, minimums, and stated production time from the supplier catalog. Final invoice may reflect decoration, proofs, rush, or freight.

FieldValue
Style #SB-1200
List price range$9.79 – $16.58 USD
Minimum quantity12
Stated production time10 days

Quantity pricing (USD)

Price per unit at each order-quantity break (from the live product page).

QuantityPrice (each)

600$9.79 each

Catalog highlights

  • Auto-Open Folding Umbrella
  • Generous 42" canopy arc
  • Folds to an easy to carry 15" long
  • Choose from 30+ colors
  • Fade-resistant waterproof pongee polyester fabric

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

4-Color Process ▼

4-Color Process is only available on outer umbrella canopy panels. It cannot be used with undercanopy printing, wide tie printing, or case printing. Process color is not available for the SB-4675, SB-4676, or SB-4677 due to the special 2-ply fabric. PMS matching does not apply to Process printing since Pantone Coated inks are not used like in screenprinting. You may still provide us with PMS numbers as a reference. Rush orders are not available with process color printing. Art-related restrictions may apply, such as minimum line weights or clear space requirements. Price breaks for process color run charges are calculated per logo. We do not combine run charges to meet higher price breaks. EQP pricing applies to products only. Setups and run charges are excluded from those calculations.

DI-4CP

4-Color Process ▼

4-Color Process is only available on outer umbrella canopy panels. It cannot be used with undercanopy printing, wide tie printing, or case printing. Process color is not available for the SB-4675, SB-4676, or SB-4677 due to the special 2-ply fabric. PMS matching does not apply to Process printing since Pantone Coated inks are not used like in screenprinting. You may still provide us with PMS numbers as a reference. Rush orders are not available with process color printing. Art-related restrictions may apply, such as minimum line weights or clear space requirements. Price breaks for process color run charges are calculated per logo. We do not combine run charges to meet higher price breaks. EQP pricing applies to products only. Setups and run charges are excluded from those calculations.

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Spectrum Folding Umbrella. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style SB-1200 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 10 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 12 units (per catalog line).
